synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-0885 Oracle Linux 8 cockpit bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-0885
description:
[310.6-1.0.1]
- Fixed cockpit_ws_t selinux issue for tmpfs [Orabug: 36013589]
- Move update-motd out of cockpit_ws_t context [Orabug: 36013589]
- Update documentation links [Orabug: 34706402]
- Drop subscription-manager-cockpit requirement for ol [Orabug: 34681110]
- Remove duplicate reference to server in cockpit [Orabug: 33862832]
- Update documentation links [Orabug: 32795691]
- Make documentation links point to Oracle Linux information [Orabug: 30271413] [Orabug: 32013095]
- Fix rendering of hwinfo page on systems with some empty memory slots [Orabug: 32826970]

[310.6]
- Remove recommends on subscription-manager-cockpit if applicable

[310.6-1]
- networking: Fix renaming of bridges and other groups (RHEL-131249)
- networkmanager: use connection.type as a fallback (RHEL-131244)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-0885

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-0885.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
cockpit-310.6-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
cockpit-bridge-310.6-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
cockpit-doc-310.6-1.0.1.el8_10.noarch.rpm
cockpit-system-310.6-1.0.1.el8_10.noarch.rpm
cockpit-ws-310.6-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
cockpit-310.6-1.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
cockpit-bridge-310.6-1.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
cockpit-doc-310.6-1.0.1.el8_10.noarch.rpm
cockpit-system-310.6-1.0.1.el8_10.noarch.rpm
cockpit-ws-310.6-1.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/cockpit-310.6-1.0.1.el8_10.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[310.6-1.0.1]
- Fixed cockpit_ws_t selinux issue for tmpfs [Orabug: 36013589]
- Move update-motd out of cockpit_ws_t context [Orabug: 36013589]
- Update documentation links [Orabug: 34706402]
- Drop subscription-manager-cockpit requirement for ol [Orabug: 34681110]
- Remove duplicate reference to server in cockpit [Orabug: 33862832]
- Update documentation links [Orabug: 32795691]
- Make documentation links point to Oracle Linux information [Orabug: 30271413] [Orabug: 32013095]
- Fix rendering of hwinfo page on systems with some empty memory slots [Orabug: 32826970]

[310.6]
- Remove recommends on subscription-manager-cockpit if applicable

[310.6-1]
- networking: Fix renaming of bridges and other groups (RHEL-131249)
- networkmanager: use connection.type as a fallback (RHEL-131244)
